method: MOLT (Microcell-Occupancy Laplace Tomography); working name SATURATION_JAILBREAK

t0_unit_tests.convergence_note: log/power-sum series needs a*max(v)<1; ES-poly exact for P<=order

selfaverage.cell_correlation_note: perfect intra-block sharing => C_eff=C/block; rms*sqrt(C_eff) stays ~const (same law as independent cells) => correlation acts purely through effective-C reduction

summary.BAR: rel se(p2) <= 10% at per-pattern budget <= 4x linear arm
summary.verdict_note: per-pattern p2 recovery costs ~n_eff^2 x the linear arm; even sparsest sane design is >1e3 x -> BAR NOT MET

verdict.P0: CONDITIONAL_PASS: mechanism real IFF intensity-additive; coherent speckle is an exact kill -- physical premise must be verified on the real bench
verdict.kill_condition: if the real optical path is coherent-additive, r depends only on p1 and MOLT is dead

P2.BAR: median d'>=3 AND >=80% pairs >=2 at matched budget

P3.honest_claim: fiber HALVING (N-K -> N-2K) + closes low-dim prior tangents (2K>=d); NOT dense-scene null-space jailbreak

t4_reconstruction.note: NOISELESS upside ceiling only; not a photon-cost claim

summary_T2.BAR: rel se(p2) <= 10% at per-mask budget <= 4x linear arm
summary_T2.note: sparse 32-support cuts n_eff ~10x -> ~100x cheaper than dense, still >>4x on matched PHOTONS (see dual-resource framing for the TIME view)

P2_sparse.BAR: median d'>=3 AND >=80% pairs >=2 at matched budget

dual_resource.dose_caveat: The two frames diverge by design. On the PHOTON axis MOLT's second channel costs ~n_eff^2 more primary opportunities than the linear bucket, so for DOSE-LIMITED scenes (photodamage, single-molecule, quantum-light budgets) the photon frame governs and MOLT LOSES. On the TIME axis those same photons are delivered in G=B/(C t*) gates at 0.1-1 MHz, so even the decisive matched-photon multiple lands at milliseconds/mask and a x30 multiple at microseconds/mask; for LIGHT-CHEAP, robust scenes the time frame governs and MOLT is essentially free.

summary.BAR: 10% p2 map at <= x40 linear detected-photon budget/mask (expect ~x30)

bar3_nullpair.BAR: favorable order-one Delta_p2/p2 pair d'>=3 at <= x4 linear dose (expect ~2.6)
bar3_nullpair.note: measured favorable-pair multiple and the closed-form f=1 dose law both reported; bar met if either production estimate <= x4

permutation_control.verdict: an equal-p1/equal-p2 spatial permutation leaves the product & coherent sweep EXACTLY invariant (curve diff ~1e-16) but changes the correlated-determinant curve (tr[(Sigma V)^2] moves); it is detectable (d'=3 reachable) -> the operative second-order observable under correlated speckle is tr[(Sigma V)^2], NOT p2. A bare curvature fit that assumes Sigma=I mis-reads a correlated determinant as p2.

verdict.P0: the generative mechanism IS identifiable from swept data at realistic noise (near-diagonal confusion); BUT product-vs-correlated identifiability requires the permutation/held-out control -- a bare curvature fit that assumes Sigma=I mis-reads a correlated determinant as p2 curvature

bar1_C_eff.k_note: base fully-developed speckle = 1 mode; k>1 divides p2 signal by k (gate demand ~ k^2, committed p0: k3/k1=9.6, k10/k1=108.6)

C2_quenched_floor.verdict: analytic S2.1 covariance matches draw_W; the G->inf floor scales as 1/sqrt(C_eff) exactly and as sqrt(n_eff) in the diffuse (beta2 t^2<<1) limit -> a fixed microcell ensemble caps curvature precision at SE/beta2 ~ (2/t) sqrt(n_eff/C_eff), no matter how many gates

C3_refresh.verdict: fixed-W SE(beta2) plateaus at the quenched floor (~1.56e-03); refreshed-W SE keeps falling ~1/sqrt(G) (effective samples ~ G*C_eff) and beats the floor by 2x at G=1e5

bar4_summary.verdict: MOLT meets <=10% end-to-end overhead ONLY in switching-limited regimes (fast gates and/or slow DMD); at 100 kHz gates with a 22 kHz DMD the ridge-heavy sweep exceeds 10%. The equal-time framing is hardware-contingent, NOT universal. 'Negligible time' is false in the gate-limited corner and must be stated per-regime.

certificate_r321.fisher_note: quadratic rows carry sqrt(I_p2/I_p1)~1/n_eff the linear information/photon: geometrically full-rank, but the smallest Fisher-weighted singular value is small -> the closure is real but dose-expensive (photon-for-rank trade)

bar6_summary.BAR: R32.1 Jacobian full-rank + conditioned on support AND noisy joint recon materially beats strongest equal-time linear comparator
bar6_summary.honest_claim: R32.1 CLOSES the fiber geometrically: rank([M_D|S;M_S|S;2M_S|S diag x])=s exactly for K_D<s<=K_D+2K_S (linear stuck at K_D), and the NOISELESS joint recon hits ~297 dB where linear is underdetermined. BUT the quadratic rows are Fisher-weak and box-constrained null perturbations give sub-order-one Delta_p2, so at the strict equal-TIME 10% p2 dose the noisy recon only ties the min-norm linear arm (delta=+0.8 dB): the fiber-resolving directions have O(1) SNR. The win is RANK/identifiability, provable noiselessly and at elevated dose; the equal-time NOISY material win is NOT established (honest photon-for-rank cost). NOT a dense-scene or prior-free recovery claim.

R32_SIX_BAR_VERDICT.frame: equal WALL-CLOCK time (R32 primary); matched-photon = mandatory adverse audit

bar1_neff_Ceff_k.requirement: n_eff<=32 on actual sparse masks x scenes; report C_eff and k
bar1_neff_Ceff_k.result: per-mask n_eff in [6.0, 19.0] (all<=32); C_eff_iid=3750 (~C=3600); k_eff=1 (fully-developed speckle)

bar2_10pct_p2_map.requirement: 10% p2 map at <= x40 linear detected-photon budget/mask (expect ~x30)
bar2_10pct_p2_map.result: production 3-level CRB multiple max x11.3 over masks; dose-law boundary n_eff=32 -> x28.8 (known); expected ~x30 confirmed

bar3_favorable_nullpair_d3.requirement: favorable order-one Delta_p2/p2 pair d'>=3 at <= x4 linear dose (expect ~2.6)
bar3_favorable_nullpair_d3.result: dose-law f=1 nuisance-p1 x2.64 (~ruling x2.6); measured aligned pair x4.52

bar4_wallclock_overhead.requirement: <=10% end-to-end overhead incl mask/settle/power/readout, {100kHz,1MHz} gates x {1,10,22}kHz DMD
bar4_wallclock_overhead.result: meets <=10% in 2/12 regimes: only switching-limited (1MHz gates + 1kHz DMD -> 4.0% at K_S=51). At 1MHz+10kHz DMD -> 29.5%; at 100kHz gates -> 22-85%. 'Negligible time' false in gate-limited corner.

bar5_P0_identifiability.requirement: 3x3 mechanism model-recovery survives at realistic noise
bar5_P0_identifiability.result: confusion recovery accuracy 0.997 (coherent/product/correlated all >=99%); permutation control: equal-p1,equal-p2 clustered-vs-spread changes tr[(SigmaV)^2] 198%, correlated d'=3 at x2.2, product blind

bar6_R32.1_certificate.requirement: R32.1 Jacobian full-rank+conditioned on support AND noisy joint recon materially beats strongest equal-time linear comparator
bar6_R32.1_certificate.result: closure window EXACT: rank[M_D|S;M_S|S;2M_S|S diag x]=s for K_D=40<s<=K_D+2K_S=100 (linear stuck at 40); noiseless recon ~297 dB; BUT noisy equal-time recon only ties linear (delta=+0.8 dB) -- fiber-resolving rows Fisher-weak, O(1) SNR at equal dose

matched_photon_adverse_audit.sparse_nullpair_d3: median d'=0.267, x126 (x2254 cheaper than dense)
matched_photon_adverse_audit.note: matched-photon FAILS by orders of magnitude and is reported as a failure per R32; equal-time is primary ONLY for dose-insensitive scenes

known_support_witness.s80_joint_vs_linear: joint 296.7 dB vs linear 27.8 dB = +268.9 dB noiseless (committed T4)
known_support_witness.caveat: noiseless known-support witness; NOT extrapolated to unknown-support noisy recovery (R32 forbidden)

R32_SIX_BAR_VERDICT.overall: MOLT survives ONLY as a sparse-support, dose-insensitive, switching-limited, equal-time method. Math fully verified; dense arm retired; photon economics fail; time economics conditional on hardware regime; mechanism identifiable; support fiber closes geometrically but its equal-time NOISY material win is unproven.
